subject: [PATCH 1/6] mm: add softleaf_to_pmd() and convert existing callers

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function `softleaf_to_pmd()` that generates a PMD entry from a leaf entry, completing the symmetry of the softleaf abstraction. It also converts existing callers of `swp_entry_to_pmd()` to use `softleaf_to_pmd()`, keeping feature patches focused on new functionality rather than refactoring. The patch is part of a series and has been reviewed by David Hildenbrand (Arm) and Zi Yan (Nvidia).
